_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin regulation of ERK signaling modulates GABA release and learning.

_contextSnippet: the Dlx5/6+/− Nf1 mice knockouts (n = 9 mice) showed 142.1%± 6.7% potentiation, whereas WT mice (n = 6 mice) showed 148.6% ±4.1%
details: Showed normal LTP - 142.1%± 6.7% potentiation between 40-50 min after tetanus, similar to WT controls
